prompt: Use image0 as the exact first frame and preserve its portrait composition, camera angle, subject identity, pose, clothing, lighting, and background. The first frame shows an East Asian man standing on a mountain viewing platform, facing the camera in a medium full-body portrait. He wears a wide-brimmed beige straw sun hat with a chin cord, rectangular glasses, a dark navy t-shirt, red backpack shoulder straps, light green shorts, and a smartwatch on his left wrist. His expression is calm and friendly with a slight closed-mouth smile. His left arm stretches outward along the black wooden railing on the left side of the frame, while his right hand rests near his waist on the right side of his body. Behind him are layered green forested mountains, distant hazy blue ridges, a bright blue sky with large white clouds, a rustic black railing, a dark vertical wooden post on the right edge, and part of a wooden roof with straw at the upper right corner. In the video, the man first slowly turns his head and gaze toward the mountain scenery on his right side, as if admiring the view, while keeping his body mostly in the same relaxed standing pose. After a brief pause, he turns his head back toward the camera, makes eye contact again, slightly brightens his smile, and raises his right hand from his waist to wave hello in a natural friendly gesture. He holds the wave briefly, then gently lowers his hand while continuing to face the camera. Keep the camera static, preserve the same portrait framing, and maintain stable facial identity, clothing details, daylight color, railing, roof, sky, clouds, and mountain background throughout the motion.
